mapper.sql: select customer_id, customer_code, customer_name, short_name, customer_type, customer_level, contact_name, contact_phone, wechat, province, province_code, city, city_code, district, district_code, address, owner_user_id, owner_user_name, owner_dept_id, owner_dept_name, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from customer
mapper.select: select customer_code from customer where customer_code like concat(#{monthPrefix}, '%') and customer_code regexp concat('^', #{monthPrefix}, '[0-9]+$') order by char_length(substring(customer_code, char_length(#{monthPrefix}) + 1)) desc, substring(customer_code, char_length(#{monthPrefix}) + 1) desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into customer( customer_code, customer_name, short_name, customer_type, customer_level, contact_name, contact_phone, wechat, province, province_code, city, city_code, district, district_code, address, owner_user_id, owner_user_name, owner_dept_id, owner_dept_name, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{customerCode}, #{customerName}, #{shortName}, #{customerType}, #{customerLevel}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{wechat}, #{province}, #{provinceCode}, #{city}, #{cityCode}, #{district}, #{districtCode}, #{address}, #{ownerUserId}, #{ownerUserName}, #{ownerDeptId}, #{ownerDeptName}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update customer set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{customerId} and del_flag = '0'

update customer set del_flag = '2' where customer_id in
#{customerId}
mapper.select: select * from customer_contact where customer_id = #{customerId} and del_flag = '0' order by is_default desc, contact_id
mapper.update: update customer_contact set del_flag = '2' where customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: insert into customer_contact(customer_id, contact_name, phone, wechat, position, contact_role, is_default, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values(#{customerId}, #{contactName}, #{phone}, #{wechat}, #{position}, #{contactRole}, #{isDefault}, #{remark}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select * from customer_address where customer_id = #{customerId} and del_flag = '0' order by is_default desc, address_id
mapper.update: update customer_address set del_flag = '2' where customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: insert into customer_address(customer_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, province_code, city, city_code, district, district_code, detail_address, logistics_line, is_default, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values(#{customerId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{provinceCode}, #{city}, #{cityCode}, #{district}, #{districtCode}, #{detailAddress}, #{logisticsLine}, #{isDefault}, #{remark}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select * from customer_salesman_bind_log where customer_id = #{customerId} order by change_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into customer_salesman_bind_log(customer_id, old_owner_user_id, old_owner_user_name, new_owner_user_id, new_owner_user_name, old_dept_id, old_dept_name, new_dept_id, new_dept_name, change_reason, change_by, change_time, remark) values(#{customerId}, #{oldOwnerUserId}, #{oldOwnerUserName}, #{newOwnerUserId}, #{newOwnerUserName}, #{oldDeptId}, #{oldDeptName}, #{newDeptId}, #{newDeptName}, #{changeReason}, #{changeBy}, #{changeTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select * from customer_fund_account where customer_id = #{customerId} order by field(account_type, 'LONG_TERM_DEPOSIT', 'ROLLING_ORDER_DEPOSIT', 'SAMPLE_REBATE')
select * from customer_fund_account where customer_id = #{customerId} and account_type = #{accountType} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into customer_fund_account(customer_id, account_type, balance_amount, frozen_amount, available_amount, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{customerId}, #{accountType}, #{balanceAmount}, #{frozenAmount}, #{availableAmount}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())

insert into customer_fund_flow(customer_id, account_type, flow_no, flow_type, amount, before_balance, after_balance, related_biz_type, related_biz_id, related_biz_no, operator_id, occur_time, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{customerId}, #{accountType}, #{flowNo}, #{flowType}, #{amount}, #{beforeBalance}, #{afterBalance}, #{relatedBizType}, #{relatedBizId}, #{relatedBizNo}, #{operatorId}, #{occurTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())

insert into customer_deposit_batch(deposit_batch_no, customer_id, deposit_type, source_order_id, source_order_no, deposit_amount, used_amount, remaining_amount, status, start_time, settle_time, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{depositBatchNo}, #{customerId}, #{depositType}, #{sourceOrderId}, #{sourceOrderNo}, #{depositAmount}, #{usedAmount}, #{remainingAmount}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{settleTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select * from customer_deposit_batch where customer_id = #{customerId} order by start_time desc, deposit_batch_id desc
select * from customer_sample_policy where customer_id = #{customerId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into customer_sample_policy(customer_id, support_mode, total_support_rate, instant_discount_rate, delivery_deduct_rate, max_deduct_per_delivery, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{customerId}, #{supportMode}, #{totalSupportRate}, #{instantDiscountRate}, #{deliveryDeductRate}, #{maxDeductPerDelivery}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update customer_sample_policy set support_mode = #{supportMode}, total_support_rate = #{totalSupportRate}, instant_discount_rate = #{instantDiscountRate}, delivery_deduct_rate = #{deliveryDeductRate}, max_deduct_per_delivery = #{maxDeductPerDelivery}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: insert into sample_rebate_record(customer_id, sample_order_id, sample_order_no, sample_amount, support_mode, total_support_rate, instant_discount_rate, instant_discount_amount, rebate_amount, used_amount, remaining_amount, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{customerId}, #{sampleOrderId}, #{sampleOrderNo}, #{sampleAmount}, #{supportMode}, #{totalSupportRate}, #{instantDiscountRate}, #{instantDiscountAmount}, #{rebateAmount}, #{usedAmount}, #{remainingAmount}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select * from sample_rebate_record where customer_id = #{customerId} order by create_time desc, rebate_record_id desc
